hero.title: Welcome to
hero.subtitle: Raising an army of Overcomers to influence the world through Faith, Love, and the Holy Spirit.

countdown.label: Don't Miss It
countdown.title: Next Sunday Worship Service
countdown.sub: Every Sunday — 8:00 AM  |  Tesano, Accra, Ghana

mandate.body: We're a Bible-based Christian church and organisation. Our core mandate is to raise an army of Overcomers who will influence their worlds through the power of the Holy Spirit and the forces of Faith and Love.

leadership.p1: Guided by a profound divine revelation, our Senior Pastor has dedicated his life to the pursuit of raising an army of believers who walk in dominion.
leadership.p2: With a vision that transcends local boundaries, he leads Overcomers Nation with a commitment to biblical excellence and the transformative power of the Holy Spirit.
leadership.p3: Under his leadership, the church has become a beacon of hope and a center for spiritual health and wholeness.

globalReach.label: Kingdom Without Borders
globalReach.title: Our Global Reach
globalReach.sub: From Accra to the nations — Overcomers Nation is raising an army that knows no borders.

testimonies.label: Trophies of Faith
testimonies.title: They Overcame
testimonies.verse: "And they overcame by the blood of the Lamb and the word of their testimony." — Rev 12:11

prayer.label: We Stand With You
prayer.title: Submit a Prayer Request
prayer.name: Your Name
prayer.successSub: Our prayer team will intercede for you.

footer.tagline: Building a nation of winners through the uncompromised word of faith.
footer.copyright: © 2024 Overcomers Nation Church. All Rights Reserved.

about.heroSub: Built on the unwavering truth of the Gospel, bridging the wisdom of tradition with the fire of the next generation.
about.missionBody: To raise a generation of believers who walk in the fullness of their divine authority, equipped with spiritual precision and modern vitality to impact every sphere of society for the Kingdom of God.
about.visionBody: To become a global beacon of light, transforming cities and nations through the manifest presence of God, establishing centers of excellence where faith meets innovation.
about.valuesSub: The pillars that sustain our movement and define our culture.
about.integrityBody: We operate with unwavering transparency and biblical standards.
about.vitalityBody: We embrace the energetic move of the Holy Spirit, fostering an environment where innovation and spiritual fire coexist.
about.excellenceBody: Precision in all we do. We believe our craftsmanship in ministry reflects the majesty of the Creator we serve.
about.ctaSub: Join us for our next service and discover what it means to live as a true overcomer.

sermons.featuredSub: Join us for this transformative message as we explore the foundations of a life built on divine certainty.
sermons.newsletterSub: Subscribe to our weekly media digest and receive the latest messages directly in your inbox.

give.heroSub: Your generosity enables us to reach nations, restore lives, and build a legacy of faith.
give.verse: "Each of you should give what you have decided in your heart to give, not reluctantly or under compulsion, for God loves a cheerful giver."
give.partnershipBody: The first tenth of our increase, acknowledging God's sovereignty over our provision.
give.offeringBody: Sacrificial gifts beyond the tithe that support specific kingdom projects and missions.
give.methodsSub: Secure, transparent, and convenient ways to support the ministry.
give.onlineBody: Quick and secure giving via credit or debit card through our encrypted portal.
give.mobileBody: Direct support via MTN or Telecel Mobile Money.
give.bankBody: Direct wire transfers for local and international partners.
give.securityBody: All transactions are encrypted and processed through industry-leading financial gateways.
give.ctaSub: If you have questions regarding your donation, our finance team is here to assist.

contact.heroSub: We are here to walk with you on your journey.
contact.subject: Subject
contact.successMsg: Thank you! We'll get back to you shortly.

ministries.heroSub: Empowering every generation to overcome and lead through faith, community, and service.
ministries.youthBody: Our youth ministry is a vibrant hub for teenagers and young adults to discover their identity in Christ.
ministries.childrenBody: A safe, fun, and engaging environment where children ages 2–12 learn the foundational stories of the Bible.
ministries.menBody: Dedicated to building godly men of integrity and strength through brotherhood.
ministries.womenBody: A community of women committed to spiritual growth and mutual support.
ministries.ctaTitle: Find Your Place in the Family
ministries.ctaSub: No matter where you are in your journey, there is a community waiting for you.
